# godaddy_domain_forwarding (Data Source)

Read GoDaddy URL forwarding for one FQDN.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fqdn` (String) Forwarded FQDN.

### Optional

- `include_subs` (Boolean) Whether to request forwarded subdomain coverage from GoDaddy.

### Read-Only

- `mask` (Attributes) Optional forwarding mask configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--mask))
- `subs` (List of String) Forwarded subdomains, if returned by the API.
- `type` (String) Forward type.
- `url` (String) Destination URL.

<a id="nestedatt--mask"></a>
### Nested Schema for `mask`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Mask description.
- `keywords` (String) Mask keywords.
- `title` (String) Mask title.
